title: cracca tenella
intro: Cracca tenella, also known as Tick-trefoil, is a perennial herb belonging to the pea family, Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Cracca tenella is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and relieving menstrual cramps. The herbal preparations of Cracca tenella typically involve drying and infusing the leaves in hot water, which can be consumed as a tea to reap its medicinal benefits.
